rationale: Build on the current best late projection EMA path, but reduce its single-decay lag by tracking both slow and fast EMAs for quantized projection weights and blending them only at finalization. The slow EMA should keep the roundtrip-stable smoothing that won run_0033, while the fast EMA adds a controlled recency correction without spending extra validation budget or perturbing the hot training loop much.
title: Dual-Rate Projection EMA Finalizer
